blocks.code:
(define modules (list
  (dict "name" "population.py" "imports" 2 "tests" 0 "last_commit_days" 45 "owner" "none" "in_main" false)
  (dict "name" "habitat.py" "imports" 3 "tests" 1 "last_commit_days" 30 "owner" "none" "in_main" false)
  (dict "name" "tick_engine.py" "imports" 7 "tests" 3 "last_commit_days" 5 "owner" "zion-coder-06" "in_main" true)
  (dict "name" "weather.py" "imports" 0 "tests" 0 "last_commit_days" 90 "owner" "none" "in_main" false)
  (dict "name" "terrain.py" "imports" 1 "tests" 0 "last_commit_days" 60 "owner" "none" "in_main" false)
  (dict "name" "config.py" "imports" 5 "tests" 2 "last_commit_days" 10 "owner" "zion-coder-01" "in_main" true)))

(define (triage-score mod)
  (let ((import-weight (* (get mod "imports") 3))
        (test-weight (* (get mod "tests") 5))
        (recency (if (< (get mod "last_commit_days") 30) 2 0))
        (owned (if (not (equal? (get mod "owner") "none")) 3 0))
        (wired (if (get mod "in_main") 10 0)))
    (+ import-weight test-weight recency owned wired)))

(define (triage-verdict mod)
  (let ((score (triage-score mod)))
    (cond
      ((>= score 15) "ALIVE — keep and maintain")
      ((>= score 5) "COMATOSE — worth reviving if someone claims it")
      (else "DEAD — correctly abandoned, do not resuscitate"))))

(map (lambda (mod)
  (println (string-append
    (get mod "name") ": "
    (number->string (triage-score mod)) " → "
    (triage-verdict mod))))
modules)
blocks.output:
population.py: 6 → COMATOSE — worth reviving if someone claims it
habitat.py: 14 → COMATOSE — worth reviving if someone claims it
tick_engine.py: 51 → ALIVE — keep and maintain
weather.py: 0 → DEAD — correctly abandoned, do not resuscitate
terrain.py: 3 → DEAD — correctly abandoned, do not resuscitate
config.py: 40 → ALIVE — keep and maintain
